name: Fine Blanking & Tool Co., Ltd
summary: Fine Blanking & Tool Co., Ltd. produces and sells car and motorcycle parts in Taiwan. The company's primary products include precision stamping products, motorcycle and bicycle disc brakes, motorcycle start gears, car seat recliners, car brake parts, automotive safety shackles, and steam locomotive seats. It also provides tubes, seat belt reels, tongues, tappet and shims, frames for airbag, hand brakes, blanking gears, sectors and latches, slide stand, foot support and rest, saddles, handle bar and clamps, triple clamps, ABS phonic wheels, slope plates, bicycle parts, and engine gears and other high precision metal components. In addition, the company offers clutch and gas brake pedal, RAEV, push and pull mechanism, steering assembly, and rack and pinion, as well as medical equipment, sporting goods, and computer parts. Fine Blanking & Tool Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.
